title: Conditionnel passé for reflection
subtitle: Say what you would have done differently.
duolingoBridge: B1 Hi moves from controlled B1 into native-style but accessible French: short articles, real conversations, nuanced opinions, and longer connected output.
overview: Knowledge point 1: express a past alternative.
Knowledge point 2: connect regret to future action.

items.fr: J’aurais pu demander de l’aide plus tôt.
items.en: I could have asked for help earlier.

items.fr: J’aurais dû vérifier l’adresse avant de partir.
items.en: I should have checked the address before leaving.
items.es: Debería haber verificado la dirección antes de salir.

items.fr: J’aurais préféré avoir plus de temps pour réfléchir.
items.en: I would have preferred to have more time to think.
items.es: Habría preferido tener más tiempo para reflexionar.

items.fr: Si j’avais su que c’était si important, j’aurais pris des notes.
items.en: If I had known it was so important, I would have taken notes.
items.es: Si hubiera sabido que era tan importante, habría tomado notas.

items.fr: La prochaine fois, je préparerai mieux mes questions.
items.en: Next time, I will prepare my questions better.
items.es: La próxima vez prepararé mejor mis preguntas.
